{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Tidewalkers
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tidewalkers]] are mostly sea creatures.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
